title: BridgeContract
description: Bridge contract artifact translating execution truth into planner language. Written after every run.

trace_id.description: Trace ID of the current run.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this contract was generated.

gate_result.description: Overall gate decision: PROCEED or HOLD.

system_delta.description: Summary of what changed in the system this run.

pm_delta.description: What changed in product meaning. 'Insufficient history' when fewer than 2 baseline records.

open_decision.description: The one decision required before the next run is meaningful. 'None' if absent.

recommended_next_step.description: The single most valuable next action for the planner.

do_not_redecide.description: Decisions already settled that must not be re-opened. Empty on first run.
